headline: Teva Celebrates the Pursuit of Adventure with New Performance and Lifestyle Footwear from its Fall 2026 Collection
summary: GOLETA, Calif., July 15, 2026--Teva®, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), introduces its Fall 2026 collection, which includes the first product co-created with Teva's Bureau of Adventure (TBA), Trailpeak, in addition to new styles in its beloved Aventrail, Hurricane, ReEmber and lifestyle franchises. In this next evolution of its ‘For Playground Earth’ brand platform, Teva continues to position itself as the ultimate companion for adventure—where play isn't just recreation, but a vital pa

headline: Deckers Outdoor: The Slowing Growth Does Not Mean The Business Is Bad
summary: Deckers (DECK) stock: strong balance sheet, UGG & HOKA growth, 14x forward P/E, and a $5B buyback. Read here for a detailed analysis.
